title: Start a Walstad Tank
description: Set up a low-tech Walstad style aquarium with soil and plants.

dialogue.text: Let's build a natural Walstad aquarium from scratch. We'll start small so you can maintain it easily.
Begin by spreading a thin layer of organic potting soil on the bottom. Cover it with gravel to prevent cloudiness later.
Add hardy stem plants like hornwort or water wisteria. They help balance nutrients while the tank settles.
Introduce a few ramshorn snails to nibble on algae while the plants settle. They'll keep the tank tidy with little effort.
Fill the tank slowly and run the filter. Test ammonia and nitrite until both read zero. This may take a few weeks.
Your Walstad tank is ready! Start with a small school of peaceful fish to maintain balance.
Enjoy your low-maintenance ecosystem. Weekly top-offs should be all you need.
